all.critique:
Below is my plain‐text critique of the analysis, including the functions or components affected along with an estimate of the severity of each issue:

1. Configuration Handling and Defaults  
 • The analysis does a good job of explaining how configuration should be loaded and validated. However, it says “raise a descriptive error or fallback to a default if defined” when keys are missing. This fallback option is not clearly defined. Using defaults without an explicit warning could silently mask
